claim: At d=4 the universal Newton-polygon characteristic root c(d) := xi_0(b)*beta_d^{1/d} equals 4 with spread 0 across 8 quartic representatives at dps=80, supporting the linear formula xi_0(b) = d/beta_d^{1/d}
The v1.1 candidate c(d) = 2*sqrt((d-1)!) is empirically falsified at d=4: it predicts c(4) = 2*sqrt(6) ~= 4.899 but PCF2-SESSION-Q1 measures c(4) = 4 with spread 0 (~22% disagreement)

Conjecture 3.3.A* (cross-degree universality of xi_0): xi_0(b) = d/beta_d^{1/d} for every degree-d PCF (1,b) in scope; status: proven d=2 (Proposition 3.3.A), verified d=4 (Proposition 3.3.A' via PCF2-SESSION-Q1, spread 0 dps=80, 8 representatives), pending d=3 (op:xi0-d3-direct)

op:xi0-d3-direct opened in CHANNEL-THEORY v1.2 sec:open: direct Newton-polygon test of xi_0 = 3/beta_3^{1/3} at d=3, one cubic representative per Galois bin from PCF-2 v1.1, target measurement at dps>=80, 1-2h estimated
